_meta.name: agentxp editorial brand values
_meta.description: Single source of presentation styling. Every renderer resolves colours, type, and the SVG/ANSI palettes through this file - no renderer hard-codes a hex value. Editorial-economist register: cream paper, warm ink, one editorial blue accent, serif headline.
_meta._derived_from: Semantic pass/fail greens & reds are COPIED from agentxp's own cli/audit_html.py (#146c2e / #b3261e) so the refactored audit page is pixel-stable. They are NOT the monorepo brand tokens (#2D8659 / #C8102E) and NOT a runtime dependency on the monorepo - this is a vendored copy by design.

editorial-dark._derived_from: pass/fail lightened from the canonical #146c2e / #b3261e for legibility on dark paper; the canonical values remain the light-theme source of truth.

_ansi_note: Bare SGR parameters; brand.ansi() wraps each as ESC[<n>m. JSON cannot portably hold a raw ESC byte.
